name: Artichoke Dip
recipeIngredient: 2 cans water-packed artichoke hearts, drained and chopped
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine all ingredients in a bowl.
2. Sprinkle with paprika.
3. Transfer to a baking dish and bake at 350°F for 30 minutes, or until bubbly.
I serve this with fresh veggies and melba toast.
